'''Sensor stars''' were an [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[F'tral]]. The five-armed [[Mollusk/Legends|mollusks]] lived in groups of 20-30, and communicated with each other via subsonic tones, relaying warnings and advisories such as "food," "emergency," and "storm" to others in the pack.

{{Creature-stub}}
